subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones! This is the Day whereof We have informed you in all the Tablets through the Most Holy and Exalted Pen. Be ye steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احبائی الیوم یوم الذی بشرناکم فیکل الالواح من قلم قدس منیعا ان استقیموا علی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
